actions.text: review the full intelligence report Sebas delivered on the barrow sighting
Albedo, assemble the Floor Guardians in the Throne Room. One hour.
consider what strategy to reveal — and what to withhold — from the Guardians
Albedo relays the summons and lingers at the door, holding a question she has not yet been given permission to voice
Speak, Albedo.
listen to Albedo's assessment with the stillness of the undead, giving nothing away
The Floor Guardians file into the Throne Room one by one, each radiating devotion that borders on the religious
survey each Guardian's face before speaking, letting the silence build
There is an anomaly on the surface. Ancient undead rising from a barrow that predates this world's written history. I wish to know who raised them.
Demiurge immediately begins to theorize, attributing to Ainz's interest a strategic depth that does not exist
let Demiurge finish his analysis and neither confirm nor deny any of it
Demiurge. Your proposal is noted. We proceed in two phases.
outline a surface reconnaissance that sounds entirely deliberate and is mostly improvised
The Guardians receive every word as sacred instruction, committing the improvised plan to memory as revelation
Shalltear. You will accompany me to the surface. Combat readiness only — no territory claims without my order.
note Albedo's reaction to being left behind without comment
The teleportation sequence deposits Ainz and Shalltear at the barrow's edge, where the earth is disturbed and wrong
examine the barrow entrance with every detection spell available
note the nature and apparent age of the magic residue around the entrance
This magic is not from this world. Stay close and do not act without my command.
Shalltear goes completely still — for a true vampire, that response means danger
widen the detection sweep to the full area surrounding the barrow
move toward the barrow entrance with measured, deliberate steps
The interior walls are carved with symbols that match nothing in Nazarick's accumulated records
These are not from any culture in this world's history. Someone carried this knowledge here from outside.
preserve rubbings of the key symbols for analysis back in Nazarick
A figure rises at the back of the barrow — not undead, but something far older and far more deliberate
evaluate the entity's power level before committing to any action or posture
You are not of this world either. State your origin and your purpose here.
The entity speaks in a language Ainz's translation skills struggle to parse — and somewhere in the syntax is the name of a YGGDRASIL player
